channel.title: ByteByteGo Newsletter
channel.description: Explain complex systems with simple terms, from the authors of the best-selling system design book series. Join over 1,000,000 friendly readers.

item.title: 【Must-Know Cross-Cutting Concerns in API Development】API 开发中必须了解的跨领域问题
item.description: 【What do authentication, logging, rate limiting, and input validation have in common?】身份验证、日志记录、速率限制和输入验证有什么共同点？

item.title: 【How Spotify Ships to 675 Million Users Every Week Without Breaking Things】Spotify 如何在不损坏设备的情况下每周向 6.75 亿用户发货
item.description: 【In this article, we will take a look at this process in detail and attempt to derive learnings.】在本文中，我们将详细研究这个过程并尝试从中吸取教训。

item.title: 【Nextdoor’s Database Evolution: A Scaling Ladder】Nextdoor 的数据库演变：阶梯
item.description: 【Nextdoor operates as a hyper-local social networking service that connects neighbors based on their geographic location.】Nextdoor 作为超本地社交网络服务运营，根据邻居的地理位置将邻居连接起来。

item.title: 【A Guide to Context Engineering for LLMs】法学硕士情境工程指南
item.description: 【In this article, we’ll look at how LLMs actually process the information you give them, what context engineering is, and the strategies that can help with it.】在本文中，我们将了解法学硕士如何实际处理您提供给他们的信息、什么是上下文工程以及可以提供帮助的策略。

item.title: 【EP209: 12 Claude Code Features Every Engineer Should Know】EP209：每个工程师都应该知道的 12 个 Claude 代码功能
item.description: 【CLAUDE. md: A project memory file to define custom rules and conventions. Claude reads at the start of every session.】克劳德。 md：用于定义自定义规则和约定的项目内存文件。克劳德在每堂课开始时都会朗读。

item.title: 【Our New Book on Behavioral Interviews Is Now Available on Amazon】我们关于行为访谈的新书现已在亚马逊上发售
item.description: 【The book is written by Steve Huynh and published by ByteByteGo.】该书由 Steve Huynh 撰写，由 ByteByteGo 出版。

item.title: 【Database Performance Strategies and Their Hidden Costs】数据库性能策略及其隐藏成本
item.description: 【A feature is deployed, and the database queries run well.】功能已部署，数据库查询运行良好。

item.title: 【How Datadog Redefined Data Replication】Datadog 如何重新定义数据复制
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how Datadog implemented the changes and the challenges they faced.】在本文中，我们将了解 Datadog 如何实施这些变更以及他们面临的挑战。

item.title: 【How Meta Turned Debugging Into a Product】Meta 如何将调试变成产品
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how DrP works on a high level and the design choices Meta made while building it.】在本文中，我们将了解 DrP 如何在高层次上工作以及 Meta 在构建它时所做的设计选择。

item.title: 【How Roblox Uses AI to Translate 16 Languages in 100 Milliseconds】Roblox 如何利用 AI 在 100 毫秒内翻译 16 种语言
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at what Roblox built and the trade-offs they made.】在本文中，我们将了解 Roblox 的构建以及他们所做的权衡。
